name: Mansion #16
description: Al-Zubana, 'The Claws,' ruled by Jupiter, represents the scales of justice and fair exchange. Particularly favorable for commerce, legal matters, and any activity requiring balance and fairness. The balanced scales of Libra, with Alpha and Beta Librae forming the claws, embody perfect equilibrium and just dealings. The generative artwork renders both scales in Jupiter's royal blue-gold palette with perfectly balanced geometric mandalas representing justice and prosperity through fair exchange.

attributes.value: Trading, legal proceedings, making contracts, seeking justice
